variants.name: v1.5-shipped
variants.desc: Just-shipped baseline: weekly 50/200 SMA at arm + earnings pre-only

variants.name: v1.6-intra
variants.desc: *** INTRA-WEEK *** Weekly RSI uses today close as partial-week close (direction matches discretionary chart-watching)

variants.name: v1.6-SMA-fallback
variants.desc: FALLBACK: v1.6 rules (RSI 70 + strict arm) but keep v1.4 weekly SMA filter at arm
